narrative:
Lima 7B (precinct in Allen County) has 941 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
